hero.headline: 23 Years of Family-Owned Pool Expertise
hero.subheadline: Pool Specialists has kept Raleigh families swimming worry-free since 2003. From weekly cleaning to complex repairs, our NSPF-certified technicians treat every pool like it belongs to their own family. You relax poolside — we handle the rest.

services.label: Our Pool Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> the Experts You Trust
services.subtitle: Whether it is a routine cleaning or a full vinyl liner replacement, our certified team handles it all so you never have to worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly and monthly maintenance plans that include water testing, chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks to keep your pool swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Pool Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing, and structural issues. Our certified techs restore your pool to peak performance, often in a single visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Professional measurement, selection, and installation of vinyl pool liners to refresh your pool's look and stop leaks before they become costly problems.

cards.title: Safety Cover Installation
cards.description: High-quality safety covers to protect your pool during the off-season and give families with children and pets complete peace of mind.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced leak detection services that pinpoint hidden leaks in your pool shell, plumbing, or equipment — saving you water, money, and headaches.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening and winterization services to properly prepare your pool for summer fun or winter protection. We handle the chemistry, covers, and equipment.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. Craig or a senior technician will assess your pool's condition and provide an honest, no-pressure recommendation within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Customize Your Plan
steps.description: Every pool is different. Our CPO-certified team designs a maintenance or repair plan tailored to your pool's size, equipment, and your family's usage.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Sit back while our trained technicians handle everything. Your pool stays clean, balanced, and ready for swimming — backed by over two decades of expertise.

about.label: Why Raleigh Trusts Pool Specialists
about.headline: Family-Owned, Certified, and Committed to Your Pool
about.description: Since 2003, Craig and the Pool Specialists team have served Raleigh-area families with honest, dependable pool care. Every one of our 17 technicians is an NSPF Certified Pool Operator — we do not just clean pools, we understand the science behind healthy water. We even teach CPO certification classes for other industry professionals, because expertise is not just our standard, it is our passion.

features.title: All Technicians CPO Certified
features.description: Every Pool Specialists technician holds an NSPF Certified Pool Operator credential, ensuring expert-level care on every single visit.

features.title: Family-Owned Since 2003
features.description: Craig founded this company 23 years ago and still oversees every aspect of service. You deal with people who care, not a faceless franchise.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated
features.description: Our A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau reflects our commitment to integrity, fair pricing, and resolving every concern promptly.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Every plan includes CPO-certified technicians and our satisfaction guarantee.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will send a technician back at no charge. Craig built this company on trust — and after 23 years, we still earn it one pool at a time. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Raleigh-Durham area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent issues like equipment failures or green pools, we do our best to accommodate same-week service. Call us and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: What makes your technicians different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Every single one of our 17 technicians is an NSPF Certified Pool Operator. We also offer CPO certification classes for other professionals in the industry — that is how seriously we take pool education and expertise.

faqs.question: Do you service pools outside of Raleigh?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve the entire Triangle region including Durham, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, Wake Forest, Knightdale, Garner, and even Lake Gaston. If you are within driving distance, give us a call.

faqs.question: How do I know if my vinyl liner needs replacement?
faqs.answer: Common signs include fading, wrinkling, cracking, or unexplained water loss. Our team can perform a thorough inspection and let you know honestly whether a repair or full replacement is the right move.

faqs.question: Are safety covers worth the investment?
faqs.answer: For families with children or pets, safety covers are one of the best investments you can make. They prevent accidental falls, keep debris out during the off-season, and can even reduce your insurance premiums. We install top-quality covers custom-fitted to your pool.

testimonials.name: Verified Neighbor
testimonials.text: Wonderful and caring staff. Very knowledgeable and experienced. I feel confident trusting them with my pool. They always go above and beyond.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: Great service, awesome people. Their pricing is very reasonable and the quality of work is excellent. I would not trust anyone else with our pool.

testimonials.name: Raleigh Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Highly recommended! They take special care of our pool and always go above and beyond with their service. True professionals who treat your pool like their own.
